mapper.select: select ts.TEAM_CODE as teamCode, ts.WINS as wins, ts.LOSSES as losses, ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, ts.PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, IFNULL(agg.pts, 0) as pts, IFNULL(agg.reb, 0) as reb, IFNULL(agg.ast, 0) as ast, IFNULL(agg.stl, 0) as stl, IFNULL(agg.blk, 0) as blk, IFNULL(agg.tov, 0) as tov from team_season ts left join ( select SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) as team, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_SCORE) as pts, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_REB) as reb, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_ASS) as ast, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_STEAL) as stl, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK) as blk, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_TURNOVER) as tov from player_stats where SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} and PLAYER_TEAM is not null and PLAYER_TEAM <> '/' group by SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) ) agg on agg.team = ts.TEAM_CODE where ts.SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} order by ts.WINS desc

select ts.SEASON_NUM as seasonNum, ts.TEAM_CODE as teamCode, ts.WINS as wins, ts.LOSSES as losses, ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, ts.PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, IFNULL(agg.pts, 0) as pts, IFNULL(agg.reb, 0) as reb, IFNULL(agg.ast, 0) as ast, IFNULL(agg.stl, 0) as stl, IFNULL(agg.blk, 0) as blk, IFNULL(agg.tov, 0) as tov from team_season ts left join ( select SEASON_NUM as ssn, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_SCORE) as pts, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_REB) as reb, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_ASS) as ast, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_STEAL) as stl, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK) as blk, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_TURNOVER) as tov from player_stats where SEASON_NUM < 50 and PLAYER_TEAM is not null and PLAYER_TEAM <> '/' and SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) = #{teamCode} group by SEASON_NUM ) agg on agg.ssn = ts.SEASON_NUM where ts.TEAM_CODE = #{teamCode} order by ts.SEASON_NUM

select ts.TEAM_CODE as teamCode, ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, ts.PLAYOFF_PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, agg.games as games, agg.pts as pts, agg.reb as reb, agg.ast as ast, agg.stl as stl, agg.blk as blk, agg.tov as tov from team_season ts join ( select SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) as team, MAX(PLAYER_APPEARANCE) as games, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_SCORE) as pts, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_REB) as reb, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_ASS) as ast, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_STEAL) as stl, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK) as blk, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_TURNOVER) as tov from player_playoff_stats where SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} and PLAYER_TEAM is not null and PLAYER_TEAM <> '/' group by SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) ) agg on agg.team = ts.TEAM_CODE where ts.SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} and ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT <> '未进季后赛'

select ts.SEASON_NUM as seasonNum, ts.TEAM_CODE as teamCode, ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, ts.PLAYOFF_PTS_ALLOWED as ptsAllowed, agg.games as games, agg.pts as pts, agg.reb as reb, agg.ast as ast, agg.stl as stl, agg.blk as blk, agg.tov as tov from team_season ts join ( select SEASON_NUM as ssn, MAX(PLAYER_APPEARANCE) as games, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_SCORE) as pts, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_REB) as reb, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_ASS) as ast, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_STEAL) as stl, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK) as blk, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_TURNOVER) as tov from player_playoff_stats where SEASON_NUM < 50 and PLAYER_TEAM is not null and PLAYER_TEAM <> '/' and SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) = #{teamCode} group by SEASON_NUM ) agg on agg.ssn = ts.SEASON_NUM where ts.TEAM_CODE = #{teamCode} and ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT <> '未进季后赛' order by ts.SEASON_NUM
